PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://macaulottery.com/picker/" -TimeoutSec 30 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content Length: $\($response.Content.Length\)"; Write-Output $response.Content } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://macaulottery.com/picker/" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing -Proxy http://127.0.0.1:10809; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $response.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(5000, $response.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Output "Proxy error: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://webcache.googleusercontent.com/search?q=cache:macaulottery.com/picker/" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Cache: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(3000, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Output "Cache error: $_" })

PowerShell(cd D:\\686; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3456/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Server running: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Server not running yet: $_" }; $proc.Id)

PowerShell(cd D:\\686; $content = Get-Content test_full.js -Raw; $start = $content.IndexOf\([char]0x53CB\); $end = $content.LastIndexOf\('`'\); $raw = $content.Substring\($start, $end - $start\).Trim\(\); $lines = $raw -split "`n"; for\($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\){ if\($lines[$i].Trim\(\).Length -gt 0\) { $ln = $i+1; Write-Output "L${ln}: $\($lines[$i].Trim\(\)\)" } })

PowerShell(cd D:\\686; $c = Get-Content test_full.js -Raw; $start = $c.IndexOf\([char]0x53CB\); $end = $c.LastIndexOf\('`'\); $lines = $c.Substring\($start, $end - $start\).Trim\(\) -split "`n"; for\($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { $a = $i+1; Write-Host "L$a`: $\($lines[$i]\)" })

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('expect:', d.get\('expect'\)\); print\('opentime:', d.get\('opentime'\)\); print\('opencode:', d.get\('opencode'\)\); print\('nextqishu:', d.get\('nextqishu'\)\); print\('hkNowDay:', d.get\('hkNowDay'\)\); print\('hkNextDay:', d.get\('hkNextDay'\)\); print\('latest:', d.get\('latest'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name'],f['download_url']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
